agniDescriptions.sama: Balanced Agni — digestion is strong and consistent. Maintain current dietary habits with seasonal variations.
agniDescriptions.vishama: Irregular Agni (Vata) — digestion fluctuates. Favor warm, cooked, regular meals. Avoid raw, cold, and erratic eating.
agniDescriptions.tikshna: Intense Agni (Pitta) — digestion is sharp and fast. Avoid spicy, fried, sour foods. Cool, sweet, moderate meals are best.
agniDescriptions.manda: Slow Agni (Kapha) — digestion is sluggish. Favor light, warm, dry foods. Avoid heavy, oily, cold, and sweet foods.

sama: Continue balanced diet with all six tastes
vishama: Avoid raw foods and cold drinks
manda: Light breakfast, skip if not hungry
Warm water with honey and lemon
